title: Cherry_hunger
description:
Replace hunger (food) UI with cherry shape
Compatible with appleskin
body:
### This resource pack replaces original hunger bar with cherry! Contains hunger debuff icons support AppleSkin



### AppleSkin option: **By default, the halo type AppleSkin is applied and please refer to the route below to replace it with a gold border** "your minecraft folder" \resourcepacks\Cherry_hunger\assets\appleskin\textures **Replace icons.png with the file inside the 'gold ver' folder**
